name: STP Transportation
registry_source: NYS DOS public inquiry (https://apps.dos.ny.gov/publicInquiry/) - unable to fetch directly via WebFetch; D&B/business directory references found
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate-only). Listed at 601 Surf Ave Apt 4N, Brooklyn NY 11224 (Coney Island area). D&B record (3468066) lists 'STP Transportation Inc' as NY corporation, ~2 employees, ~$98K revenue, in business since 2007 providing transportation services. SAFER keyword searches for STP TRANSPORTATION / STP TRANSPORTATION INC returned no NY matches; only STP TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 3286639, Flowery Br GA) and STP TRANSPORT INC (USDOT 3069024 Northridge CA; USDOT 2270887 Broadview IL) - none match Brooklyn NY address. Likely small intrastate operator providing transport services. Phone (347) 492-4419.

name: Tania School Bus
registry_source: FL Sunbiz (search.sunbiz.org) - direct fetch returned 403; verified via Sunbiz proxy searches and web sources
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate-only). Operates as 'Tania School Bus Services' at 318 E 9th Ct, Hialeah FL 33010. Owner appears to be Tania Rech (LinkedIn profile under 'Tania Rech - Tania School Bus'). Website taniaschoolbus.com. Provides door-to-door private school transportation for Hialeah Elementary, Miami Springs Middle, and Miami Springs High School with 'more than 15 years of experience' (per Yelp/Yellow Pages), implying founding ~2008-2010. SAFER searches for TANIA SCHOOL BUS returned no results; broader TANIA carrier search returned no FL school-bus operator at this address. Intrastate-only school bus operation under FL DOE/PSA jurisdiction.

name: Cape Cod Small Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: PA Dept of State business search (file.dos.pa.gov) - unable to fetch directly; SAFER and web searches conducted
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate-only). Listed at 756 Lindsay Rd, Carnegie PA 15106 (Allegheny County, suburban Pittsburgh). SAFER keyword searches for CAPE COD SMALL BUS / CAPE COD BUS returned no results; broader CAPE COD search returned 127 carriers all Massachusetts-based - no PA matches. Unusual name for a PA school bus company; possibly a small Pittsburgh-area school bus contractor. No PA corporate registry record retrieved via web. Likely dissolved or very small intrastate operator; name suggests 'small bus' (mini-bus / school van) service.

name: M R Bus Co
registry_source: GA SOS Corporations (ecorp.sos.ga.gov) - direct fetch returned 403; SAFER and web searches conducted
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate-only). Listed at PO Box 706, Baxley GA 31515 (Appling County). SAFER searches for M R BUS / M R BUS CO / MR BUS returned no GA matches (only unrelated KMMR BUSINESS GROUP NY; M&R Transportation Holyoke MA). Appling County Schools operates its own bus shop at 680 Blackshear Hwy in Baxley; M R Bus Co likely a small private/contracted school bus operator or possibly a dissolved/inactive entity. PO Box address suggests small family operation. No GA SOS corporate record retrieved via web.

name: Colonial Bus Svc
registry_source: PA Dept of State business search (file.dos.pa.gov) - unable to fetch directly; SAFER and web searches conducted
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate-only). Listed at 359 Brickcrafter Rd, New Oxford PA 17350 (Adams County, Conewago Valley SD area near Hanover). SAFER searches for COLONIAL BUS / COLONIAL BUS SERVICE / COLONIAL BUS SVC returned no PA matches. Conewago Valley SD's primary transportation contractor is reportedly Lincoln Coach Lines, not Colonial Bus Svc. Brickcrafter Rd is a residential road; small home-based bus operator likely.
